subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Aid Thy sincere servants to remain firm in Thy mighty Covenant, and preserve them within the shelter of Thy protection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اید عبادک المخلصین علی الثبوت علی میثاقک العظیم ثم احفظهم فی صون
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
